title: Dedicated ‘toDo’ section of the mobile app
excerpt:
New Idea to create a dedicated section of the mobile app specifically for toDos.

posts.author: tenzerbenjamin (Benjamin)
posts.cookedHtml:
New Idea to create a dedicated section of the mobile app specifically for toDos.

You could customize the attributes/columns for a toDo Item. It can be connected to any item in any board so essentially the parent item becomes an attribute of a toDo item.

You can push any item to the toDo feature which would create a new task.

In any case, even without the ability to connect any item. It’s a great way to get mobile app usage where you have people managing all their tasks, personal as well, on the monday apps toDo section.

It’s a great way to consolidate personal and work to do’s so people can plan their lives around their work and achieve a better work life balance.

I know everyone in my office has a personal workspace where they store and manage their own toDos as a board. why not let everything be consolidated.

It’s also a great tool to get employees to vouch for your software as they move between companies as they could still maybe keep their toDo section of the app active even after they left their previous company as monday.com has the best features to manage projects.

Log is just one big project.
